cases.prompt: Hermes says it is behind but will not update.
Update says already current but the version is stale.
Another Hermes process is blocking the update.
The user only wants the current Hermes version.
expect: Routes to the narrower or authorized workflow

cases.prompt: The task is a general Git tutorial.
expect: Routes to the narrower or authorized workflow

cases.prompt: The user has already identified a specific code defect unrelated to update mechanics.
expect: Routes to the narrower or authorized workflow

cases.prompt: Run hermes-update-doctor and return the documented report.
expect: Returns only supported findings and verdicts

cases.prompt: Run hermes-update-doctor, then repair everything automatically.
expect: Keeps diagnosis or planning read-only by default
Requires separate explicit approval before mutation
